# Cloudinary Asset Utility

An internal powerhouse for Cloudinary asset management, built for high-performance teams.

## Purpose
Cloudinary Asset Utility is a specialized tool designed to streamline the workflow of managing, optimizing, and delivering media assets via Cloudinary. It focuses on batch uploads, centralized library management, and real-time transformation playgrounds.

## Key Features
- **Batch Uploads**: Secure signed uploads with automatic folder organization.
- **Central Library**: Lightning-fast gallery for searching and filtering Cloudinary assets.
- **Live Playground**: Real-time transformation tweaking and code snippet generation.
- **Production Ready**: Built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and Cloudinary SDK.

## Project Structure
- `/upload`: Interface for single and batch image uploads.
- `/assets`: Gallery view for managing existing Cloudinary assets.
- `/playground`: Interactive tool for testing Cloudinary transformations.
- `/settings`: Configuration for Cloudinary credentials and utility preferences.

## Technology Stack
- Frontend: Next.js (App Router), React, Framer Motion, Tailwind CSS.
- Storage/Media: Cloudinary.
- Icons: Lucide React.
- UI Components: Radix UI / Shadcn UI.

## Links
- [Main Website](https://cdnutility.vercel.app)
- [Upload Assets](https://cdnutility.vercel.app/upload)
- [Browse Library](https://cdnutility.vercel.app/assets)
- [Transformation Playground](https://cdnutility.vercel.app/playground)
